case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ORLANDO GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ORLANDO $2,181.12 PRINCIPAL, $383.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,564.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100178938)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100178938) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67741066) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ORLANDO DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-2022
